DefaultCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance of the LJCPerson class.

ParameterizedCtor.summary: Initializes an LJCPerson instance with provided values.

CopyCtor.summary: Initializes a new instance by copying another object.

Clone.summary: Creates a deep copy of the current object.

SetOriginalState.summary: Sets original values to current and clears changes.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the database generated primary key.

ParentID.summary: Gets or sets the foreign key to the parent record.

Name.summary: Gets or sets the person's name (max 60 chars).

Description.summary: Gets or sets the person's description (max 100 chars).

ChangedProperties.summary: Gets or sets the list of modified property names.
